notes: Live deterministic scenario is supported from runtime config. Notebook quantiles are intentionally excluded from overlays because they diverge from the current deterministic pipeline.
Cross-state charts are deterministic live runs only. Quantile availability is reported but not substituted.
Turning metrics are recomputed from live deterministic runs. Precomputed quantiles are informational only.
Only aligned `results/` quantiles are offered in this mode.
Legacy notebook files are exposed only as separate artifacts with a mismatch warning.
Mirrors the applied explorer scenario. Quantile bands are shown only when an aligned `results/` file exists.

Live deterministic scenario is supported from runtime config. The aligned default quantile file exists but its p05-p95 band is currently zero-width. Notebook quantiles are intentionally excluded from overlays because they diverge from the current deterministic pipeline.
Cross-state charts are deterministic live runs only. Quantile availability is reported but not substituted.
Turning metrics are recomputed from live deterministic runs. Precomputed quantiles are informational only.
Only aligned `results/` quantiles are offered in this mode. The current aligned baseline file has zero-width p05-p95 bands.
Legacy notebook files are exposed only as separate artifacts with a mismatch warning.
Mirrors the applied explorer scenario. Quantile bands are shown only when an aligned `results/` file exists. The current aligned baseline file is zero-width.
